dropzone: drop your CSV here or click to browse
dropzoneReplace: drop another file or click to replace
privacyTitle: Your data never leaves your browser
privacyBody: Analysis runs entirely in your browser using DuckDB-Wasm — a full SQL engine compiled to WebAssembly. No server, no uploads, no logs.
privacyDevTools: Skeptical? You should be - and you can check.
sizeWarning: Large file detected - analysis may take longer than usual.
sensitivityConservativeDesc: Only obvious outliers. Fewer false positives. (IQR × 3.0)
sensitivityBalancedDesc: Standard detection. Works for most datasets. (IQR × 1.5)
sensitivityAggressiveDesc: Catches subtle patterns. Expect more noise. (IQR × 1.0)
sensitivityHint: Outlier detection runs only on numeric measurement columns. Columns named `id`, `*_id`, `timestamp` and columns where every value is unique are excluded automatically.
errorNoHeaders: CSV file has no valid column headers.
errorMinRows: CSV file must have a header row and at least one data row.
errorJsonArray: JSON file must contain an array of objects (e.g. [{...}, {...}]).
errorEncoding: Could not read file. It may be corrupted or use an unsupported encoding (UTF-8 required).
hint1Desc: Drop CSV or JSON - stays in your browser
hint2Desc: Adjust outlier threshold in the sidebar
hint3Desc: Filter by type, copy TSV, or send to ForgeMe
tooltipMissed: Injected anomaly was not detected. Try increasing sensitivity in the left panel.
tooltipFalsePositive: Detected but not injected - may be a real anomaly or a false alarm. Lower sensitivity to reduce noise.
